macro.title: Case-Shiller shows further cooling of US home prices in March
macro.what: Case-Shiller data shows prices up 0.7% year over year, down 0.2% month over month, and inflation running 2.6 points higher in March.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
